data.body: PASS 1 review — T10 (Infrastructure / IaC) [overlay]: NOT-APPLICABLE / PASS. This plan builds and validates the ISF evaluation criterion (a single-turn frontier-model evaluator fed a session log + ticket graph) plus eval-suite validation. It provisions no infrastructure — no cloud resources, no IaC (Terraform/CloudFormation/CDK/Pulumi/Ansible), and no Kubernetes/Helm. The T10 overlay applies only when a plan provisions or configures infrastructure, so it is correctly not-applicable here. No findings.
